name: Palak Paneer
recipeInstructions:
1. Empty the ricotta cheese into an oven-proof dish and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. Cut it into half-inch square pieces.
2. Defrost the spinach. Put it into a blender and blend until smooth.
3. Heat oil in a pan. Fry onion, garlic, ginger, and chillies until the onion turns golden.
4. Add cumin, coriander, and turmeric powder to the pan. Pour in the sour cream, followed by the blended spinach. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
5. Add the baked ricotta cheese pieces to the pan. Add 1/2 cup of water and salt. Cover and cook over low heat for 15 minutes.
6. Serve with rice or naan (bread available at Indian stores) or pita bread. For a tofu variation, use firm tofu, dry it on a paper towel, and bake at 200°F for about half an hour. Do not use sour cream in this version; it works well too.
